Video.summary: A man seeks justice for stolen property and unpaid debt while questioning his future with a distant girlfriend.
Video.title: Whitehurst vs. Briggs

Video.summary: Linda says John wrote an IOU for his DUI but he said he was drunk during signing.
Video.title: Too Sauced to Sign

Video.summary: Dawn wants her unpaid wages. Stegen says the organizers didn't pay him so he wasn't obligated to pay her.
Video.title: The Exotic Erotic Ball

Video.summary: Jail, bail, and a relationship gone stale. The Wallaces come to Cutlers Court for help.
Video.title: Wallace vs Wallace

Video.summary: A surprise confession changes the course of Johnathan and McKenzie's budding relationship.
Video.title: Renneberg vs. Peterson

Video.summary: Accusations of betrayal threaten their future as Christopher and Michelle seek to determine the fate of their family and home.
Video.title: Gore vs. Sherman

Video.summary: Clashing personalities have an entrepreneurial couple butting heads in their business ventures.
Video.title: Tunstall vs. Moody

Video.summary: Dawn confronts her boyfriend, Josh, about ongoing entanglements with his ex and various other women.
Video.title: Jones vs. Shaffer

Video.summary: A sperm donor, suspicions of infidelity, and broken trust bring Shannon and Jasmine's rocky five-year romance to the courtroom.
Video.title: Bowman vs. Bennett

Video.summary: Exes squabble in court over who’s to blame for their failed relationship.
Video.title: Johnson vs. Fletcher

Video.summary: A Georgia couple clashes in court over an ultimatum to marry or move on.
Video.title: Billingsley vs. Perrilloux

Video.summary: Delvon's suing for wifi costs and alienation of affection. Tedmenia says she's just chatting online!
Video.title: Anti-Social Network

Video.summary: Sarah is suing her former friend for the bail money that she posted for him.
Video.title: Bail Bonds Break Bonds

Video.summary: Herve Ambwa is accusing his counsin of selling his beloved Wii gaming console Irvin swears he would never do such a thing and that is was stolen due to his roommates negligence.
Video.title: What Happened to the Wii?

Video.summary: Former roommates and ex-lovers, Shelby and Natalie, settle a dispute over unpaid rent money.
Video.title: Hannan vs. Davila

Video.summary: A 9-year age difference and past infidelity have Samoria questioning her relationship with Marlon. Polygraph results will determine their future.
Video.title: Fitzpatrick vs Shields

Video.summary: Michigan couple Monica and Murjonie feud over finances and his failing business ventures.
Video.title: Ewell vs. Stitt

Video.summary: Tensions run high in the courtroom as Gayla and James decide if they should call off their wedding.
Video.title: Williams vs. Edwards

Video.summary: An exhausted mother gets a surprise after putting her dreams on hold for her family.
Video.title: Prince vs. Thornton

Video.summary: The mysterious disappearance of a prized Steelers jersey has Michelle and Ken's 23-year relationship on the line.
Video.title: Lozon vs. Lozon

Video.summary: Perrion and Steven didn't last as a couple but hope to make it as business partners; it may be time for a drug test.
Video.title: Roberts vs. Powell

Video.summary: A DNA test, a relationship on the edge and an ultimatum that could change everything put a young couple's future on the line.
Video.title: Wright vs. Flanagan

Video.summary: A polygraph test will determine if Deandre has been unfaithful to his girlfriend, Olivia.
Video.title: Shiel vs. Spraggins

Video.summary: After her boyfriend, Barry, takes a suspicious "business trip" to Miami, Brooke suspects him of cheating with his ex.
Video.title: Daniels vs. White

Video.summary: A Georgia man questions if his girlfriend’s late night “work calls” mean she’s escorting again. A polygraph test will reveal all.
Video.title: Ubani vs. Green

Video.summary: A club bathroom threesome and a busted car window have ex-lovers at each other's throats.
Video.title: Aikens vs. Brown

Video.summary: An Atlanta couple struggle to find common ground while dealing with a party lifestyle and a string of broken promises.
Video.title: Ellis vs. McCray

Video.summary: Laura is suing her ex-friend and workmate for a loan. Caylee says Laura offered money without any obligations!
Video.title: The Devil's in the Details

Video.summary: Johnny is suing his former friend for costs stemming from a botched dog-sitting deal.
Video.title: Sin and Tonic

Video.summary: Natash is suing her younger sister for damages from to her home from wild parties that she threw.
Video.title: House Party

Video.summary: Melvin is suing a real estate broker for a bogus electric bill and lost rent, claiming she stole his identity to pay her bills. Jacqueline catogorically denies any of Melvin outrageous claims.
Video.title: Buyers are Liars

Video.summary: When a wife sues her own husband, the gloves come off and there are no rules...accept his. Now find out who wins when Judge Karen rules on him.
Video.title: My Chauvinist Husband Lied, Cheated and Stole!

Image.alt: My Chauvinist Husband Lied, Cheated and Stole!
My Chauvinist Husband Lied, Cheated and Stole!
My Chauvinist Husband Lied, Cheated and Stole!

Video.summary: Mark is suing his sister over his home's repair work. She claims that he is lying and exaggerating.
Video.title: A Riff in the Family

Video.summary: Amanda is suing her ex-best friend Bernardo for thousands spent on bail money to hair care.
Video.title: Ya Booze Ya Lose

Video.summary: Dolly Parton impersonator Charlene is suing her cousin over a loan. Tiffany says she never wanted repayment.
Video.title: Hello Dolly

Video.summary: Bunny and Benny need Judge Lynn's advice. One wants recompense from the other due to a failed experiment.
Video.title: You're No Einstein

Video.summary: While shopping for a website designer Brent met Joe but what a tangle website of woes did they weave.
Video.title: Website of Woes

Video.summary: When Paul's pricy remote control helicopter "disappears" from Sean's consignment shop, Paul claims foul play.
Video.title: Remote Control Chopper Theft

Video.summary: Maxine Span says she and the defendant have been good friend forever and she is shocked and appalled to be here in court with her, but what’s right is right, she loaned her 240 bucks. The defendant, Sherise Dunlap, says the plaintiff told her the money she gave her was a gift, then turns around and changes her tune saying it was a loan. Her son even threatened her! She called the cops and is sticking to her guns saying the money was a gift. She is accused of un-friending a friend.
Video.title: Unfriending A Friend

Video.summary: Linda Morris says she bought some jewelry from the defendant’s shop, but once she started wearing it she broke out in a terrible rash. She had to seek medical treatment for the blisters the cheap jewelry caused, but this shady businessman refuses to return her money or pay her doctor’s bill. Sergio says Linda purchased 14kt gold items but came back claiming she was allergic to gold. He exchanged the items for silver, and again she returned claiming allergies. He can’t predict every customer’s medical history and he doesn’t give refunds. He’s accused of meddling with someone’s health.
Video.title: Meddling with Her Health

Video.summary: Dave Shelton sues Gary Garver for $10,000, claiming unpaid wages for two years on Garver's radio show. Shelton says he quit due to on-air mistreatment, but Garver insists Shelton was just a guest and never requested payment.
Video.title: Radio Riot

Video.summary: Cate sues Ann Rosa for $1,140, claiming Ann sold her a defective pellet stove, misrepresenting it as functional. Ann argues the stove worked when sold, and any issues are Cate’s responsibility.
Video.title: Fireworks Over a Faulty Stove

Video.summary: Malik is here to peition the court for a paternity test after believing his girlfriend was cheating on him.
Video.title: Unplanned Parenthood

Video.summary: Amanda is suing her nail tech Jonyell after paying her to take a nail class but she breached their contract.
Video.title: Getting Nailed for Class Tuition

Video.summary: Plaintiff rented a room from the defendant; he's suing for the return of his security deposit.
Video.title: Room for Rent

Video.summary: The plaintiff says her sister tried to push her out of a car and strangle her with a seat belt.
Video.title: Sibling Rivalry

Video.summary: Claudette is suing her neighbor for jumping her and falsely accusing her of pullling a gun on her daughter.
Video.title: Gunning for Her Neighbor

Video.summary: Delores says her twin sister agreed to split her medical bills when she became ill while planning her party.
Video.title: Bachelorette Party Gone Bad

Video.summary: A photographer says the defendants told her their wedding ceremony was canceled due to the pandemic, so she refunded their money; she now believes that was a lie, so she's suing.
Video.title: Save the Fake Date

Video.summary: Irma demands a refund for the party bus she rented from LaToya, stating it wasn't decorated properly.
Video.title: Unhappy Birthday Party
